economic_notes: Band has ownership interest in Antares Construction LLP, Antares Project Services LLP, and Lightfoot Gas Station Limited Partnership. Also holds 50% ownership in Lilloet Salish Enterprises Ltd. GBEs not consolidated due to unavailable financial information. Forensic audit by MNP LLP initiated post year-end for potential policy violations related to health funding disbursements.
notes: Audit is qualified because GBE and partnership financial information was not available and not consolidated. Prior period restatement: amounts owing to School District #74 were omitted in prior years, restating 2022 accumulated surplus down by $171,559. Post year-end forensic audit by MNP LLP initiated. Bank of Montreal construction loan transferred to band member personally after year-end. No schedule of remuneration included in the financial statements. total_government_transfers calculated as ISC $1,870,104 + Government of Canada $703,988 + First Nations Health Authority $487,459 + Province of BC $208,040 + CMHC $30,850 + First Nations Emergency Services $16,997 + Lillooet Tribal Council $69,542 + FNESC $54,530 + BC Hydro $590,229 (treated as government entity) - note BC Hydro inclusion is debatable; osr calculated as total revenue minus total_government_transfers.
warnings: Qualified audit opinion issued — financial statements may not fully reflect true position
